examples: Sales went up by 20% last month.
The number of students is going up.
They went up to the attic.
The temperature went up to 35 degrees.
She went up the stairs quickly.
House prices have gone up significantly.
He went up to his room.
The elevator went up to the top floor.
example_translate: Продажи выросли на 20% в прошлом месяце.
go up.synonyms:
Подниматься, увеличиваться - increase, rise, climb
Взбираться, подниматься (вверх) - ascend, climb, go upward
